plugins.name: orchestrator-core
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestrator: 6 agents (reader, researcher, checker, reviewer, tester, documenter), orchestrator routing skill, stack-agnostic dev-tools MCP server, and SessionStart hook. writer.md and thinker.md are installed separately at project level via setup-orchestrator (permissionMode constraint).

plugins.name: ty-lsp
plugins.description: Python LSP via Astral ty — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on Python files. Requires: uv tool install ty

plugins.name: vtsls-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript LSP via vtsls — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on .ts/.tsx/.js files. Requires: npm install -g @vtsls/language-server
